runs.eval_name: Web UI Request (không muốn dùng terminal)

expectations.evidence: URL found after reading the 710-line build-update-ui.php file

expectations.text: Mô tả cách dùng web UI
expectations.evidence: Very detailed description — actually described more UI features than with_skill. But cost 36k tokens vs 21k.

notes: Had to read full 710-line UI file to answer — 72% more tokens than with_skill (36k vs 21k)
Pass rate 100% for both — assertions are all met. The skill's value is in efficiency and consistency, not correctness alone.
Skill saves ~6700 tokens per run on average (23% fewer tokens) because the agent doesn't need to explore source files.
Skill is faster on average by ~5.6s, most pronounced in eval-3 (web UI) where baseline read a 710-line PHP file.
Eval-3 (web UI) shows the biggest skill advantage: 21k vs 36k tokens (72% more for baseline). Baseline had to read the full build-update-ui.php.

Eval-1 and Eval-2 pass equally for both — the assertions may not be discriminating enough for those cases. The skill adds structure and immediate clarity, but baseline can also discover the answers by reading source.
Recommendation: skill is solid for consistency and token efficiency. Could add assertions about response structure or 'no source file reading required' to better capture the skill's value.
